case_title: DONA PEPITA FASHION VS NERY AZUCENA

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NERY AZUCENA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,200.00 FILED BY DONA PEPITA FASHION AS TO DEFENDANT NERY AZUCENA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-08-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
